mapper.sql: o.`出库单编号` AS outboundId, o.`出库单号` AS outboundNo, o.`出库类型` AS outboundType, o.`出库时间` AS outboundTimeRaw, o.`经办人编码` AS handlerId, o.`审核时间` AS auditTimeRaw, o.`审核人编码` AS auditorId, o.`关联合同号` AS contractCode, o.`关联客户编号` AS customerId, o.`出库去向类型` AS destinationType, o.`出库去向名称` AS destinationName, o.`出库备注` AS remark, o.`创建时间` AS createTimeRaw, o.`更新时间` AS updateTimeRaw, o.`状态` AS status, o.`是否锁定` AS locked, o.`锁定时间` AS lockTimeRaw, o.`锁定人编码` AS lockUserId, o.`锁定原因` AS lockReason, o.`version` AS version
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM OUTBOUND o WHERE o.`出库单号` = #{outboundNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT o.`出库单编号` AS outboundId, o.`出库单号` AS outboundNo, o.`出库类型` AS outboundType, DATE_FORMAT(o.`出库时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS outboundTime, o.`经办人编码` AS handlerId, e.`员工姓名` AS handlerName, DATE_FORMAT(o.`审核时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS auditTime, o.`审核人编码` AS auditorId, ae.`员工姓名` AS auditorName, o.`关联合同号` AS contractCode, o.`关联客户编号` AS customerId, c.`企业名称` AS customerName, o.`出库去向类型` AS destinationType, o.`出库去向名称` AS destinationName, o.`出库备注` AS remark, o.`状态` AS status, o.`是否锁定` AS locked, DATE_FORMAT(o.`创建时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime, DATE_FORMAT(o.`更新时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updateTime, wi.`出库危废明细编号` AS itemId, wi.`库存编号` AS stockId, wi.`入库危废明细编号` AS warehousingItemId, wi.`危废条目编号` AS hazardousWasteItemId, wi.`废物名称` AS wasteName, wi.`废物代码` AS wasteCode, wi.`危险特性` AS hazardFeature, wi.`废物形态` AS form, wi.`库位` AS location, wi.`基本计量单位` AS measureUnit, wi.`是否启用辅助核算` AS enableAuxiliaryAccounting, wi.`辅助计量单位` AS auxUnit, wi.`辅助单位每基础单位数量` AS auxPerBase, wi.`出库数量` AS outboundQty, wi.`出库辅助数量` AS outboundAuxQty, CASE WHEN o.`状态` = '已审核' THEN CAST(IFNULL(s.`当前重量`, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) + IFNULL(wi.`出库数量`, 0) ELSE CAST(IFNULL(s.`当前重量`, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END AS beforeStockQty, CASE WHEN o.`状态` = '已审核' THEN CAST(IFNULL(s.`当前重量`, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(IFNULL(s.`当前重量`, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) - IFNULL(wi.`出库数量`, 0) END AS afterStockQty, CASE WHEN o.`状态` = '已审核' THEN CAST(IFNULL(s.`辅助数量`, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) + IFNULL(wi.`出库辅助数量`, 0) ELSE CAST(IFNULL(s.`辅助数量`, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END AS beforeAuxQty, CASE WHEN o.`状态` = '已审核' THEN CAST(IFNULL(s.`辅助数量`, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(IFNULL(s.`辅助数量`, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) - IFNULL(wi.`出库辅助数量`, 0) END AS afterAuxQty, wi.`有价类重量` AS valuableWeight, wi.`无价类重量` AS valuelessWeight, wi.`出库原因` AS outboundReason, DATE_FORMAT(wi.`创建时间`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS itemCreateTime FROM OUTBOUND o LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON e.`员工编码` = o.`经办人编码` LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE ae ON ae.`员工编码` = o.`审核人编码` LEFT JOIN CUSTOMER c ON c.`客户编码` = o.`关联客户编号` LEFT JOIN OUTBOUND_WASTE_ITEM wi ON wi.`出库单编号` = o.`出库单编号` LEFT JOIN STOCK s ON s.`库存编号` = wi.`库存编号` WHERE o.`出库单编号` = #{outboundId} ORDER BY wi.`出库危废明细编号`
SELECT MAX(`出库单号`) FROM OUTBOUND WHERE `出库单号` LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
